title: paeonia officinalis var. russoi
intro: Paeonia officinalis var. russoi, also known as Russian peony, is a variety of the Paeonia officinalis plant, a flowering perennial native to Europe and Asia, traditionally used for its medicinal and ornamental purposes. The plant contains compounds such as paeoniflorin and paeonol, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Russian peony include relief from pain and inflammation, improved digestion, and reduced stress and anxiety levels. Russian peony can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tinctures, and capsules, allowing for convenient and effective use in traditional medicine practices.
